title: setaria verticillata var. robusta
intro: Setaria verticillata var. robusta, also known as robust false bristlegrass, is a type of grass native to Africa and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of robust false bristlegrass include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in traditional remedies such as poultices or salves.
